moves.name: Jaguar Step > Mid Kick

moves.notes: Generic low parry. Tornado affect on success.

moves.name: Arm Whip

moves.name: Spinning Heel Hold
moves.notes: Parry opponent's left kick. Side switches randomly. Opponent recovers in FUFL.

moves.name: Leg Screw > Figure Four Leg Lock

moves.notes: Homing 2 throw break (except from behind). RSSB2 from side/behind, RSSB1 from front, doesn't change to left/right/behind throw. Opponent recovers in FUFT. Throw can be canceled by input b/db.

moves.name: Reverse Special Stretch Bomb (Cancel)
moves.notes: Side Step that ducks high and covers long distance quickly, recovers in crouch. Input by u/d,n,n+2+4,b/db.

moves.name: Deadly Boomerang
moves.notes: Deals a lot of chip damage on block. Tracks side steps. In game frame data incorrectly shows that SSL 3+4 is i21

moves.name: Whirling Spring Kick

moves.name: Winding Nut

moves.name: Suplex

moves.name: Executioner Drop

moves.name: Knee Crusher

moves.name: Half Boston Crab

moves.name: Cobra Twist

moves.name: Knee Bash

moves.name: Figure Four Leg Lock

moves.name: Stretch Buster

moves.name: Ultimate Tackle (UT)

Throw break 1+2 in a 6f window, frames 1~6 Reverse tackle with 1+2 in a 17f window, frames 7~23, then 1+2 in a 2f window, frames 24~25 Transition to UT r30 on hit Catches standing and crouching opponent from all directions. Can be done from Crouch Level 1

moves.name: Ultimate Punch

moves.name: Armbar

moves.name: Arm Twist
moves.notes: Cannot throw break. Opponent recovers in FUFA.

moves.name: Leg Cross Hold

moves.name: Stretch Combo

moves.notes: 1 or 2 throw break, depending on King's input. Opponent recovers in FUFR.

moves.name: Wing Tearer
moves.notes: 1 or 2 throw break, depending on King's input. Opponent recovers in FDFA.

moves.name: Turn Over
moves.notes: 1 or 2 throw break, depending on King's input. Opponent recovers in FDFL/FDFR.

moves.name: Camel Clutch
moves.notes: 1 or 2 throw break, depending on King's input. Side Switch. Opponent recovers in FDFL.

moves.name: Bow & Arrow Stretch Hold
moves.notes: 1 or 2 throw break, depending on King's input. Opponent recovers in FDFL.

moves.name: Mid-Air Leg Cross Hold
moves.notes: Homing Cannot throw break. Input f+1+3 to increase throw range, but its startup is 3 frames slower. Opponent recovers in FDFT.

moves.name: Spine Cracker
moves.notes: Tornado Homing Cannot throw break. Input f+2+4 to increase throw range, but its startup is 3 frames slower. Opponent recovers in FUFT.

moves.name: Double Heel Hold (DHH)
moves.notes: Cannot throw break. Opponent recovers in FDFL.

moves.name: Flapjack (From DHH)
moves.notes: 1 throw break. Opponent recovers in FDFT.

moves.name: Giant Swing (From DHH)
moves.notes: 2 throw break. Mash 1/2/3/4 to roll in midscreen to reduce damage, on wall splat damage is 32. Opponent recovers in FUFT if fails to roll.

moves.name: Running Jaguar Bomb
moves.notes: Floor Break Cannot throw break. Input n,f,F+2+4 within 6 frames after dash startup (f,n,f) to execute "blue spark" (+5 damage). Opponent recovers in FUFT.

moves.name: Aerial Jaguar Bomb
moves.notes: Floor Break Cannot throw break. Also by JGR.1+3 against airborne opponent. Input all 6 directions of throw, press df for 1-3F, at most 1F of f followed by f+1 or f+2 for blue spark (+5 damage). Opponent recovers in FUFT.

moves.name: Shining Torpedo
moves.notes: Cannot throw break. Also converts from RKO. (f,hcf+1_2): Input all 6 directions of throw, press df for 1-3F, at most 1F of f followed by f+1 or f+2 for blue spark (+5 damage). (f,f,F+2+4): Input n,f,F+2+4 within 6 frames after dash startup (f,n,f) to execute "blue spark" (+5 damage). Opponent recovers in FUFR.

moves.name: Reverse Arm Slam (RAS1)
moves.notes: Homing 1 throw break. Side Switch. Very slow crouch dash then grab. Opponent recovers in FUFA.

moves.name: Backdrop (RAS2)
moves.notes: Cannot throw break. Input with 2,1,1+2 for more damage. Opponent recovers in FUFR.

moves.name: German Suplex (RAS3)
moves.notes: 1 or 2 throw break, depending on King's input. Input with 3+4,1 or 3+4,2 for more damage. Opponent recovers in FUFR.

moves.name: Power Bomb (RAS4)
moves.notes: Cannot throw break. Input with 1,2,3+4 for more damage. Opponent recovers in FUFT.

moves.name: Giant Swing (RAS5a)
moves.notes: 1 throw break. Side Switch. Input with 2,1,3,4 for more damage. On wall splat damage is 31. Opponent recovers in FUFT. Max damage 97.

moves.name: Muscle Buster (RAS5b)
moves.notes: 2 throw break. Side Switch. Input with 3,1,2,3+4,1+2 for more damage. King recovers in backturn stance. Opponent recovers in FUFA. Max damage 91.

moves.name: Reverse Special Stretch Bomb (RSSB1)
moves.notes: Homing 2 throw break. Side Switch. Very slow crouch dash then grab. Opponent recovers in FUFT.

moves.name: Side Step to RSSB2 / RSSB1
moves.notes: Homing 2 throw break (except from behind). RSSB2 from side/behind, RSSB1 from front, doesn't change to left/right/behind throw. Opponent recovers in FUFT. Throw can be canceled by input b/db.

moves.name: Cannonball Buster (RSSB2)
moves.notes: Cannot throw break. Input with 2,2,1+2 for more damage. Opponent recovers in FUFT.

moves.name: Manhattan Drop (RSSB3)
moves.notes: 1 or 2 throw break, depending on King's input. Input with 3+4,1 or 3+4,2 for more damage. Opponent recovers in FDFA.

moves.name: Victory Bomb (RSSB4)
moves.notes: Cannot throw break. Input with 1,2,3+4,1+2 for more damage. Opponent recovers in FUFT.

moves.name: Giant Swing (RSSB5a)
moves.notes: 1 throw break. Side Switch. Input with 2,1,3,4 for more damage. Opponent recovers in FUFT. Max damage 94.

moves.name: Muscle Buster (RSSB5b)
moves.notes: 2 throw break. Input with 3,1,2,3+4,1+2 for more damage. King recovers in backturn stance. Opponent recovers in FUFA. Max damage 88.

moves.name: Standing Heel Hold (SHH1)
moves.notes: 2 throw break. Opponent recovers in FDFR.

moves.name: S.T.F. (SHH2a)
moves.notes: 1 throw break. Side Switch. Opponent recovers in FDFR. Max damage 50.

moves.name: Scorpion Death Lock (SHH2b)
moves.notes: 2 throw break. Opponent recovers in FDFR. Max damage 55.

moves.name: Indian Death Lock (SHH2c)
moves.notes: 1+2 throw break. Opponent recovers in FDFL.

moves.name: King's Bridge (SHH3ca)
moves.notes: Cannot throw break. Opponent recovers in FDFT. Max Damage 85.

moves.name: Arm Breaker (AB1)
moves.notes: 1 Throw break. Opponent recovers in FUFT.

moves.name: Triple Arm Breaker (AB2a)
moves.notes: 1 throw break. Opponent recovers in FUFT. Max damage 50.

moves.name: Head Jammer (AB2b)
moves.notes: 2 throw break. Opponent recovers in FUFL.

moves.name: Struggle Combination (AB2b1)
moves.notes: Cannot throw break. Opponent recovers in FUFR. Max Damage 60.

moves.name: Chicken Wing Face Lock (AB2c)
moves.notes: 1+2 throw break. Opponent recovers in FDFT.

moves.name: Dragon Sleeper Finish (AB3ca)
moves.notes: 1 throw break. Opponent recovers in FUFA. Max damage 65.

moves.name: Rolling Death Cradle (AB3cb)
moves.notes: 2 throw break. Opponent recovers in FUFL. Max damage 100.

moves.name: Cobra Clutch (MMD1)
moves.notes: Homing 1 or 2 throw break, depending on King's input. Opponent recovers in FDFT. Becomes f,hcf+1 / 2+4 on air grab / wall splat.

moves.name: Cobra Twist (MMD2)
moves.notes: Cannot throw break. Opponent recovers in FUFL.

moves.name: Reverse DDT (MMD3)
moves.notes: 1 or 2 throw break, depending on King's input. Opponent recovers in FDFA.

moves.name: Reverse Special Stretch Bomb (MMD4)
moves.notes: 1 or 2 throw break, depending on King's input. Opponent recovers in FUFA.

moves.name: Samurai Rock (MMD4a)
moves.notes: 1+2 Throw break. Opponent recovers in FDFR. Max Damage 69.

moves.name: Backdrop (MMD5)
moves.notes: Cannot throw break. Opponent recovers in FDFA.

moves.name: Sol Naciente (MMD6a)
moves.notes: 1+2 throw break. Opponent recovers in FDFL. Max Damage 93.

moves.name: Burning Hammer (MMD6)
moves.notes: 1 or 2 throw break, depending on King's input. Opponent recovers in FDFA.

moves.name: Screwdriver (MMD7)
moves.notes: 1 or 2 throw break, depending on King's input. Opponent recovers in FUFA. Max Damage 116.
